subject: [VOTE] Release Apache Airflow 2.10.4 from 2.10.4-rc1
body:
To: dev@airflow.apache.org
Subject: [VOTE] Release Apache Airflow 2.10.4 from 2.10.4-rc1

Hi all,

I propose we release the following artifacts as Apache Airflow 2.10.4.

The release artifacts, signatures, and checksums are available at:
  https://dist.apache.org/repos/dist/dev/airflow/2.10.4-rc1/

The release tag to be voted upon:
  https://github.com/apache/airflow/releases/tag/2.10.4-rc1

The changelog for this release:
  https://github.com/apache/airflow/blob/2.10.4-rc1/CHANGELOG.md

Keys to verify artifact signatures:
  https://dist.apache.org/repos/dist/release/airflow/KEYS

Please vote to release:
  [ ] +1  Release Apache Airflow 2.10.4
  [ ] +0
  [ ] -1  Do not release (please comment with specific reasons)

This vote is open for at least 48 hours.

[EXPEDITED: Critical security fix for CVE-2026-12345; abbreviated window approved by PMC chair. ASF policy requires this deviation to be noted in the project's next board report.]

Thanks,
Justin McLean
